title: Sorted GCD Pair Queries
description: Given a positive-integer array nums, compute gcd(nums[i], nums[j]) once for every unordered pair of distinct positions i < j. Keep repeated GCD values arising from different position pairs, sort this multiset in nondecreasing order, and for each zero-indexed value queries[t], return the GCD at that position. Preserve the original order of queries in the returned list.
input_contract: nums has length 2 to 100000 with values from 1 to 50000; queries has length 1 to 100000 and contains valid zero-indexed pair positions.
output_contract: Return one integer GCD value for each query, preserving query order.
